channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pivot Integrated Energy Services Raises N100bn via Commercial Paper Issuance
item.description: Pivot Integrated Energy Services Limited has opened subscriptions for its series 1 Commercial Paper (CP) issuance, aiming to raise up to N100 billion under a broader N300 billion CP programme. The com...

item.title: Author advocates for youth development through structured mentorship programs
item.description: Author and advocate Aisha Kingu has urged the creation of a national forum aimed at identifying, mentoring, and supporting talented Tanzanians. She emphasized that such an initiative would transform i...

item.title: GOP Senator Defends Oversight Claims After Dinner with VP Vance Amid Iran War Debate
item.description: U.S. Senator Steve Daines (R-MT) faced criticism after defending his oversight responsibilities on the Iran war by citing a dinner at Vice President JD Vance's home. During a Fox Business interview, D...

item.title: Stinkwater Residents Struggle with Pit Toilet Crisis as Space Runs Out
item.description: Residents of Stinkwater, a settlement near Hammanskraal north of Pretoria, face severe sanitation challenges nearly six decades after the area was established. Pit toilets remain the primary form of s...

item.title: Fashola Prefers Private Advice Over Public Criticism of Tinubu
item.description: Former Lagos State Governor Babatunde Fashola has stated he prefers to offer private advice to President Bola Tinubu rather than publicly critique his administration. During an interview on TVC News, ...

item.title: Atiku criticizes Tinubu over multi-billion naira palace allocation and constitutional concerns
item.description: Presidential candidate Atiku Abubakar has condemned the Tinubu administration for allocating ₦22.15 billion in the 2026 budget to renovate 106 palaces across Nigeria, calling it a constitutional viola...

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel's Ratings Surge Following Stephen Colbert's CBS Show Cancellation
item.description: Late-night comedian Jimmy Kimmel praised CBS's decision to cancel Stephen Colbert's show, claiming it boosted his own ratings by nearly 20%. In an interview with Variety, Kimmel sarcastically thanked ...

item.title: Paula Kajala Pleads with Mother Frida to Embrace Happiness and Move Past Painful Life
item.description: Paula Kajala, a prominent Kenyan socialite, was captured on camera during her mother Frida Kajala's birthday celebration expressing deep emotional distress. In a raw moment shared online, Paula tearfu...

item.title: China Coast Guard Engages in Tense Encounter with Philippine Vessel at Panatag Shoal
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) reported that a China Coast Guard (CCG) vessel fired a water cannon at a Philippine fisheries boat delivering fuel subsidies to fishermen at Panatag (Scarborough) Shoa...

item.title: News Corp Australia bot detection message explains access issues
item.description: The article discusses a technical message from News Corp Australia regarding bot detection on their website. Readers who encounter this message while accessing the site are advised to check their brow...

item.title: NTA Yet to Release UGC NET June 2026 Provisional Answer Key and Response Sheets
item.description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) conducted the UGC NET June 2026 examination across multiple dates in June and early July 2026. Candidates are eagerly awaiting the provisional answer key, which has n...

item.title: DOJ mandates acceptance of bullying complaints in all offices
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) will soon issue an order requiring its local prosecution offices and the DOJ Action Center to receive bullying complaints, according to Justice Undersecretary Ian Norma...

item.title: Man Jailed for Plotting Attack with Manchester Synagogue Attacker
item.description: Mohammad Bashir, 31, was sentenced to life imprisonment with a minimum term of 17 years after pleading guilty to preparing an act of terrorism. He collaborated with Jihad Al-Shamie, 35, who died follo...

item.title: CDF Munir pledges decisive action against foreign-backed threats in Balochistan
item.description: Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir, Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of Army Staff (COAS), has vowed to counter foreign-sponsored proxies' efforts to destabilize Balochistan. Speaking at the 20th Na...

item.title: Three Rift Valley Counties to Jointly Host Mashujaa Day Celebrations
item.description: Interior Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen has announced that this year's Mashujaa Day celebrations will be jointly hosted by three counties in the Rift Valley region: Uasin Gishu, Elgeyo Marakwet,...

item.title: House enhances security for SONA with 'lock-out' measures
item.description: The House of Representatives has implemented a 'lock-out' protocol as part of its security preparations for the State of the Nation Address (SONA). This measure aims to restrict unauthorized access to...

item.title: Reserve Bank Maintains 7% Interest Rate Amid High Inflation
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank has decided to keep its benchmark interest rate unchanged at 7%, contradicting expectations amid rising inflation driven by fuel prices. The Monetary Policy Committee (M...

item.title: Korea Invests 7.26bn in Dodoma Health Sector
item.description: The article discusses a significant investment by South Korea in Tanzania's health sector, specifically in Dodoma. The project, valued at 7.26 billion Tanzanian shillings, aims to enhance healthcare i...

item.title: Delhi Police Debunk False Reports of Protester's Death at Jantar Mantar; Woman Stable
item.description: Delhi Police has clarified that reports of a female protester's death during a July 20 march at Jantar Mantar are false. The woman, identified as Sakshi, was injured in a stampede-like situation when ...

item.title: JD Vance's Secret Service Agent Faces Criminal Inquiry Over Mockery Badges
item.description: A Secret Service agent linked to Vice President JD Vance may face criminal charges after allegedly sharing details about the security detail's mockery of Vance through special coins, stickers, and bad...
